title: Entity Move Towards Target Behavior
description: Allows mob to move towards its current target.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 2

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 0.9

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description:
Defines the radius in blocks that the mob tries to be from the target. A value of 0 means it tries to occupy the same block as the target

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 32
